name: How is fault determined in an on-the-job car accident in West Valley City?
description: Scope of employment for employer liability; comp covers employee regardless.[1]

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in an on-the-job car accident in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Scope of employment for employer liability; comp covers employee regardless.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: For work-related vehicle accidents, Utah assesses if within scope of employment for vicarious liability.[1] Workers' comp covers regardless of fault. Key factors: (1) Employer liable if on job duties; (2) Prove control and benefit to employer; (3) Off-duty exempts employer; (4) Third-party fault allows extra claim. Gather logs, schedules; file comp and personal injury if applicable. Attorney clarifies employer vs. third-party responsibility.[1]
